title: Shaadi.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Shaadi.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shaadi.com family as a Full Stack Developer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shaadi.com:
Shaadi.com is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com!
